flavor.quip_buy: You bought confidence with a wooden handle.
flavor.quip_break: The hammer retired after a long career in impact studies.

flavor.description: Turns tiny doubts into tight decisions.
flavor.quip_buy: You bought a polite spiral persuader.

flavor.description: For nuts, bolts, and life adjustments.
flavor.quip_buy: You bought leverage and a mild shoulder workout.
flavor.quip_break: The wrench now mostly resembles intent.

flavor.description: Makes holes where plans become real.
flavor.quip_buy: You bought a very loud yes.
flavor.quip_break: The drill now hums only in memory.

flavor.description: Cuts boards and overconfidence to size.
flavor.quip_buy: You bought straight lines with a side of sawdust.
flavor.quip_break: The saw has entered a contemplative, toothless phase.

flavor.quip_buy: You bought seventeen opportunities to hold still.
flavor.quip_break: The ladder is now two short ladders and a lesson.

flavor.quip_buy: You bought objective truth in a plastic tube.
flavor.quip_break: The bubble escaped and took geometry with it.

flavor.description: Makes gaps disappear and corners believable.
flavor.quip_buy: You bought a paste launcher for tiny diplomacy.
flavor.quip_break: The trigger now negotiates only with itself.

flavor.description: For clean cuts and rough schedules.
flavor.quip_buy: You bought precision with a pocket clip.
flavor.quip_break: The blade retired to paper-only ambitions.

flavor.description: Beeps confidently near walls and occasionally near hope.
flavor.quip_break: It now identifies only emotional support beams.
